name: a namespace not in scope is revealed as activated false with a null via
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "an AI credentialing platform" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); fs=d["full_surface"]; e=fs.find{|x|x["namespace"]=="helm"}; exit(e && e["activated"]==false && e["via"].nil? ? 0:1)' && echo unactivated-null-via 1>&2
